parsed.production_notes: The video combines live-action footage of a person's hands and a physical environment with digital screen recordings of an app featuring 3D animated avatars.

characters.appearance: Only torso and hands are visible. Light complexion.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt with a large graphic of yellow, blue, and green flowers.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Brown skin, short curly brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: White collared shirt under a dark grey suit jacket.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Light skin, light blue hair styled in two high buns.

scenes.setting: A light-colored marble countertop, daytime. Props include a cake box, a plate with cake, a fork, a smartphone, and a stylus.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A's torso and hands are visible over a light marble countertop. Character A's left hand holds a white plate containing a partially eaten slice of cake with white frosting and yellow filling. Their right hand uses a silver fork to take a piece of the cake. To the left is a partially visible black cake box with crumbs. To the right, a smartphone lies flat on the counter. Character A then uses a pink stylus to tap the phone screen.

scenes.visual_description: A top-down view of a person eating cake while interacting with a language learning app on their phone. The person takes a bite of cake and then uses a stylus to tap the screen, which displays a 3D avatar. Text overlays highlight the cost comparison between the cake and the app subscription.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Because one and one make two together. [Because one and one make two together.]
Unknown speaker says: Why do you think 1 plus 1 equals 2? Tell me what you know. [Why do you think 1 plus 1 equals 2? Tell me what you know.]
scenes.on_screen_text: 케이크 한 판 가격이면 스픽 2개월 무제한 (Speak 2 months unlimited for the price of a whole cake)

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital interface featuring Character B. Character B stands in the center, gesturing with her right hand. The background behind her is blurred, showing a rising line graph. Later, a simple, rounded blue 3D blob character with small eyes and a smile appears against a light blue and white gradient background.

scenes.visual_description: A fast-paced sequence of screen recordings demonstrating various features of the app. It shows pronunciation feedback, a grid of different AI avatars, a conversational interface with Character B, and progress screens featuring a blue blob mascot. Numerous text overlays explain the benefits of the app, such as real-time correction and customized lessons.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Hello! I heard you want to discuss your important point about the second half of the year's promotions. What have you noticed so far that we should change or improve? [Hello! I heard you want to discuss your important point about the second half of the year's promotions. What have you noticed so far that we should change or improve?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
저는 지하철 타고 다녀요. (I take the subway.)
발음과 문법을 실시간으로 교정해 주고 (Corrects pronunciation and grammar in real-time)
틀려도 바로 고쳐주니까 (Because it corrects you immediately even if you are wrong)
눈치 안 보고 영어로 말할 수 있어요 (You can speak English without worrying about what others think)
매일 20분이면 100문장을 직접 말하고 (If you spend 20 minutes a day, you can speak 100 sentences yourself)
나만의 맞춤형 레슨을 만들어 보세요! (Create your own customized lessons!)
틀린 표현은 내 약점을 기반으로 (Incorrect expressions are based on my weaknesses)
맞춤 수업을 만들고 복습시켜 줍니다 (Creates customized lessons and lets you review)
그래서 같은 실수를 반복하지 않게 해줘요 (So it prevents you from repeating the same mistakes)
그만큼 영어로 말하면 표현이 머릿속에 남고 (The more you speak in English, the more the expressions stay in your head)
입에서도 자연스럽게 나오게 됩니다 (And it comes out naturally from your mouth)
전엔 버벅댔던 말이 그냥 나오는 순간이 진짜 와요 (The moment when the words you used to stutter just come out really comes)
매일 20분만 스픽 써보세요 (Try using Speak for just 20 minutes a day)

panels.panel_visual_description: A sleek, dark grey smartphone is shown against a solid, bright blue background. The phone rotates to reveal the front screen. The screen displays Character C. Character C is looking forward.

scenes.visual_description: A 3D render of a smartphone spins into view against a vibrant blue background. The phone screen displays the app interface featuring Character C. Text overlays encourage the viewer to start using the app, accompanied by the brand logo.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: 영어 스피킹은 스픽. [English speaking is Speak.]
scenes.on_screen_text: 더 많은 영어 표현을 알고 싶다면 지금 스픽에서 시작하세요! Speak (If you want to know more English expressions, start with Speak now! Speak)
